slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Streamline GIBill® certification processes with our automated tool. In just five steps, keep your student veterans moving. Sign up for a demo today.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, 'Submit for Approval', which could benefit from a more concise headline to better match the other steps.
